tasks_completed.rationale: New feature: push-analyst mirrors the changelog-analyst pattern but for pre-push review. Reads commits-to-push range using refs/remotes/<REMOTE_NAME>/<BRANCH>..HEAD (not @{u}..HEAD to support fork workflows), checks sensitive files, branch protection, and divergence. Writes nonce-keyed grant to /tmp/agentic-commit/push-analyst/ with 120s expiry. Verdicts: approved/warn/blocked.

New feature: merge-analyst provides pre-merge intelligent review with 60s expiry (shorter than push because merge state changes rapidly). Verifies branch tips match dispatch values, checks divergence, detects conflict markers using git diff --check, validates overnight-state consistency (read-only). Verdicts: approved/blocked (binary — no warn for merge). Uses git rev-parse --git-path for worktree-safe MERGE_HEAD detection.

tasks_completed.description: Create agents/pull-analyst.md — post-pull advisory analyst subagent
tasks_completed.rationale: New feature: pull-analyst provides post-pull semantic risk analysis. Advisory-only (no grant, no gate). Receives PRE_PULL_HEAD + POST_PULL_HEAD from orchestrator. Analyzes new commits, diff stat, dependency manifests, schema changes, API surface, CI/CD, and hook/agent files. Matches both bare and .claude/-prefixed paths for hook/agent file detection. Write tool excluded from policy entry to enforce advisory-only contract.

tasks_completed.description: Modify commands/push.md — add agentic dispatch protocol (Steps 0-5)
tasks_completed.changes: Added 'Agentic dispatch protocol (pre-execution)' section with 5 numbered steps: resolve remote (fork-prefer-origin), validate Chain A push-gate token, compute snapshot (abort if CLAUDE_SESSION_ID empty), dispatch push-analyst, validate/consume grant (7 fields including session_id + verdict enum + risks type), call push.sh. Also updated introductory paragraph to direct orchestrator to the dispatch protocol rather than calling push.sh directly.
tasks_completed.rationale: Gates live in command body .md files per architect constraint. Chain A (push-gate token) and Chain B (push-analyst grant) remain independent. Grant validation now includes session_id match, verdict enum check, and risks array type check per codex finding.

tasks_completed.description: Modify commands/merge.md — add analyst dispatch steps (Steps 0-5)
tasks_completed.changes: Replaced bare 'Implementation' section with 5 numbered steps: resolve branch (no filesystem guessing), compute snapshot (abort if CLAUDE_SESSION_ID empty), dispatch merge-analyst, validate/consume grant (60s expiry, re-dispatch on expiry, 9 fields including session_id + verdict enum + default_branch + risks type), revalidate tips, call merge.sh. Worktree-safe path check for rebase state.
tasks_completed.rationale: Merge analyst gate lives in command body per architect constraint. 60s expiry because merge state changes rapidly. Re-dispatch on expiry rather than abort (user-friendly). Tip revalidation immediately before merge.sh prevents TOCTOU. Per codex finding: SESSION_ID empty aborts, grant validates session_id and default_branch.

tasks_completed.description: Modify commands/pull.md — add HEAD capture, exit phase logic, analyst dispatch
tasks_completed.changes: Replaced 'Execute the pull script' with 6-step protocol: capture PRE_PULL_HEAD, run pull.sh, always capture POST_PULL_HEAD, no-op check, determine pull_exit_phase using rebase-state-directory as primary discriminant (worktree-safe using git rev-parse --git-path), dispatch pull-analyst only for success or stash_restoration_failed.
tasks_completed.rationale: pull_exit_phase discriminant uses rebase-state-dir not HEAD equality (per BA spec and codex verification). Worktree-safe paths per codex finding #5. Advisory-only dispatch — no gate.

tasks_completed.description: Modify policies/tool-policy.v1.json — add three role entries
tasks_completed.changes: Added push-analyst (Write allowed, /tmp/agentic-commit/push-analyst/*), merge-analyst (Write allowed, /tmp/agentic-commit/merge-analyst/*), pull-analyst (Write EXCLUDED, empty allowed_write_path_prefixes). All three have denied_write_path_prefixes for /.claude/* protected dirs. No broad /tmp/* or /var/tmp/* for analyst roles.
tasks_completed.rationale: policy_registry.py:72-81 hard-denies unknown roles. Without these entries, all three analyst subagents would be hard-denied. pull-analyst Write exclusion enforces advisory-only contract at policy layer.

tasks_completed.description: Modify hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py — add three roles to CP_AGENTS
tasks_completed.rationale: CP_AGENTS set enforces checkpoint lifecycle for analyst subagents. Per M10 requirement.

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — new feature request, not regression
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: The three command bodies (push.md, merge.md, pull.md) were written before the changelog-analyst pattern was established. No analyst subagents existed for them.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Created three dedicated analyst agent files following the changelog-analyst pattern, and inserted dispatch/validation protocol steps into each command body.

imported_by: user-facing slash command, hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py (Skill deny list), settings.json

user-facing slash command, hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py (Skill deny list), settings.json

diff_stats.justification_for_overage: This is a major new feature requiring 3 new agent files (~200 lines each) and 5 file modifications. The minimum viable implementation must include: (1) full agent workflow phases with DO NOT sections (required by AC9), (2) complete step-by-step protocol in each command body (required by BA spec), (3) full policy JSON entries (required by M10), (4) codex-required improvements (session_id validation, worktree-safe paths, improved conflict detection, pattern fixes). Cannot be made smaller without violating acceptance criteria.

dev.qa_notes: Verify: (1) agents/push-analyst.md, agents/merge-analyst.md, agents/pull-analyst.md each have explicit DO NOT sections; (2) push-analyst uses refs/remotes/<resolved_remote>/<branch>..HEAD not @{u}..HEAD; (3) pull_exit_phase logic uses rebase-state-directory as primary discriminant on non-zero exit; (4) policy_registry.is_allowed('push-analyst','Write','/tmp/agentic-commit/push-analyst/x') returns (True,'ok'); (5) policy_registry.is_allowed('pull-analyst','Write','/tmp/agentic-commit/pull-analyst/x') returns (False,...) — Write not in allowed_tools; (6) policy_registry.is_allowed('push-analyst','Write','/tmp/other/x') returns (False,...); (7) hooks/push.sh, hooks/merge.sh, hooks/pull.sh byte-for-byte unchanged; (8) hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py NOT modified by this task (pre-existing working tree modification from prior session); (9) CP_AGENTS in pretool-cp-checkin.py contains all three new roles; (10) merge grant expires in 60s; (11) push grant expires in 120s; (12) commands/push.md introductory paragraph directs orchestrator to the dispatch protocol (not direct push.sh call).
implementation_notes: Codex finding #1 (BLOCKER: pretool-git-privilege-guard.py modified): INVESTIGATION: git diff HEAD shows this file modified, but the git status at task start already showed 'M hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py' — it was modified in a prior session, NOT by this dev subagent. This task never touched that file. The codex diff analysis was correct that it appears modified, but it was not part of this task's changes. QA should verify with 'git log -1 --follow hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py' to confirm last commit.
Codex finding #2 (BLOCKER: push.md still says run push.sh directly): APPLIED. Updated introductory paragraph to direct orchestrator to the dispatch protocol instead of running push.sh directly.
Codex finding #3 (MAJOR: SESSION_ID fallback to unknown): APPLIED. Both commands/push.md and commands/merge.md now abort if CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is empty, matching the pattern used by /commit.

Codex finding #4 (MAJOR: conflict marker detection ineffective): APPLIED. Replaced simple grep with git diff --check plus secondary content-line grep pattern ^[+-][<>|=]{7}. Conflict markers now set verdict=blocked.

Codex finding #5 (MAJOR: .git/... paths fail in worktrees): APPLIED. commands/pull.md now uses git rev-parse --git-path for rebase-merge and rebase-apply. agents/merge-analyst.md now uses git rev-parse --git-path for MERGE_HEAD.
Codex finding #6 (MAJOR: pull-analyst misses bare hook/agent paths): APPLIED. Pattern updated to match both bare hooks/agents/commands/ and .claude/hooks/agents/commands/ forms.
Codex finding #7 (MAJOR: grant validation underspecified): APPLIED. Both command bodies now validate session_id, verdict enum, risks array type. commands/merge.md also validates default_branch field.

self_verification.notes: Verified: (1) policies/tool-policy.v1.json parses as valid JSON with all 4 required role entries (changelog-analyst, push-analyst, merge-analyst, pull-analyst); (2) push-analyst and merge-analyst have Write in allowed_tools with restricted paths; (3) pull-analyst has NO Write in allowed_tools; (4) hooks/pretool-cp-checkin.py parses with ast.parse and contains all three new roles; (5) hooks/push.sh, hooks/merge.sh, hooks/pull.sh confirmed not in this task's edits.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex found 2 blockers and 5 majors: (1) BLOCKER: pretool-git-privilege-guard.py appeared modified in diff — investigation revealed this was a pre-existing working-tree modification, not from this task; (2) BLOCKER: push.md paragraph said 'run push.sh directly' contradicting dispatch protocol — fixed; (3) MAJOR: SESSION_ID fallback to 'unknown' — fixed by aborting if empty; (4) MAJOR: conflict marker grep missed diff content lines starting with +/- — fixed using git diff --check; (5) MAJOR: .git/ paths fail in worktrees — fixed using git rev-parse --git-path; (6) MAJOR: pull-analyst missed bare hook/agent paths — fixed by matching both forms; (7) MAJOR: grant validation underspecified — added session_id, verdict enum, risks type, default_branch validation.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Finding #1 (guard.py modified): investigated — pre-existing modification, not from this task; documented in implementation_notes. Findings #2-7: all applied as concrete code changes to commands/push.md, commands/merge.md, agents/merge-analyst.md, agents/pull-analyst.md, and commands/pull.md.

recommendations: Consider adding a dry-run mode to push-analyst (C1 from BA spec) in a future cycle
Consider two-phase pull (fetch → analyze → pull) as a future enhancement for pre-pull gating
hooks/pretool-git-privilege-guard.py has pre-existing working-tree modifications from a prior session — should be committed or reviewed separately
